results.input: mujhe ek dozen kela aur ek dozen anda chahiye
results.notes: Hindi + English mix: 'I need one dozen bananas and one dozen eggs'
results.actual_reply:
✅ Added 1 dozen of kela to cart. Cart has 13 item(s).
✅ Added 1 dozen of anda to cart. Cart has 14 item(s).
results.judge_reason: Intent correctly identified as add_to_cart. The system successfully parsed the Hindi/Hinglish input and added both items (kela and anda) with correct quantities (1 dozen each). The reply is clear and confirms both additions. Minor point: 'dozen' is typically 12 items, so the cart increment from 13 to 14 items seems unusual (should be +12 for each dozen), but the core functionality of recognizing items and quantities is excellent.
